description: Lift a single cube above a threshold height — the canonical sanity task.
Pick one cube and stack it stably on top of another.
Sort four objects from a bin into their matching target bins.
Fit square & round nuts onto their corresponding pegs.
Turn the handle and swing a door open.
Wipe markings off a whiteboard surface — contact-rich, sensor-driven.
Two arms lift a pot by both handles while keeping it level.
Two arms coordinate to insert a peg held by one into a hole held by the other.
One arm hands an object across to the other in a coordinated handoff.
